Specialties: Everything paint related. Happy to accommodate any paint/stain request. Established in 2014. As the newest addition to the Reno Paint Mart family, which was established in 1952, Carson Paint Mart has happily been serving the surrounding areas as well as supporting the local community.

Reno, Truckee and Carson Paint Mart is a family-owned and operated company. We opened our doors in Reno back in 1952 to serve Northern Nevada and California. In 2000, we expanded our service area to Truckee, California by opening Truckee Paint Mart, and in 2014, opened our third flagship in Carson City. Business Website Address
Find top-quality paint and expert advice at Carson Paint Mart. Your local Paint Store Carson City for interior, exterior, and specialty coatings.

Like its sister stores in Reno and Truckee, Carson Paint Mart will feature products from Pittsburgh Paints, Benjamin Moore, and Devoe Paints, as well as stains from SuperDeck, and will also provide equipment rentals and contractor referrals.
